objective: Add Segment Builder v2 governance UI
validationPlan: cd frontend; npm run lint; npm run build:ci; .\node_modules\.bin\playwright.cmd test tests/e2e/audience-segments.spec.ts tests/e2e/audience-data-extensions.spec.ts --project=chromium --reporter=line
rollbackNotes: Preserve unrelated user changes; revert only this checkpoint scope if explicitly approved.
nextAction: Safe stop requested. Resume with automation-artifact-selector-ux or collect external evidence for blocked release/provider/high-volume items.
outcome: Added a mode-aware Segment Builder governance panel with local built-in field classifications, PII/incomplete/index review warnings, advanced tenant/workspace/suppression/execution lock indicators, draft-only unsupported family states, responsive rule rows, E2E coverage, and parity-matrix notes that keep backend governance/audit and parity claims unproven.
validationRun: git diff --check -- frontend/src/components/audience/SegmentRuleBuilder.tsx frontend/src/lib/ui-mode-contract.ts frontend/tests/e2e/audience-segments.spec.ts docs/product/salesforce-parity-matrix.md (PASS; CRLF warnings only)
residualRisks: Segment governance locks are local UI indicators only; no persisted segment lock/audit API exists yet.
Draft segment count and execution-plan preview still require a persisted segment ID; no unsaved draft preview endpoint exists.
Relationship traversal, behavioral event rollups, recursive segment nesting, target performance evidence, and parity claims remain out of scope.
